description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a low-pitched, dark gray hip roof and a light-colored exterior, likely finished in stucco or painted siding. The structure features a prominent front entrance with a small covered porch, flanked by symmetrical windows. A driveway leads up to the house, with a carport or garage area visible on one side and a small landscaped section with trees and shrubs near the entrance. The windows are arranged in a regular pattern along the front and sides, providing ample natural light. The overall design is compact and horizontal, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story, light-colored bungalow with a dark hip roof, symmetrical windows, a front porch, and a driveway with landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage/carport area, and landscaping near the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the continuation of the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, garage/carport, and landscaping details.
